## Technical Considerations

**Technology/Tools you envision using**:
- Programming language: [e.g., Python, R]
- Key libraries: [e.g., pandas, scikit-learn]
- APIs: [e.g., Slack API, OpenAI API]
- Visualization: [e.g., Streamlit, Plotly]

**Estimated complexity**:
- [ ] Simple (1-2 metrics, single data source)
- [ ] Moderate (3-5 metrics, multiple data sources)
- [ ] Complex (many metrics, ML/AI components, real-time processing)

**Checklist before submitting:**
- [ ] I've searched existing frameworks to ensure this doesn't duplicate existing work

- [ ] I'm committed to following up on this proposal
